title: Nenje Nenje Lyrics Ennathan Pesuvatho Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Nenje Nenje (Duet)
Singer(s): Harshdeep Kaur, Dhilip Varman
Lyrics: NA. MuthuKumar
Movie: Ennathan Pesuvatho
Music: D Imman

Nenjae nenjae nenjae nenjae
nee pogum paadhai engae
kaal thodarndhu nadakkum angae

Nenjae nenjae nenjae nenjae
nee siriththa katchi engae
kan thodarndhu nadakkum angae.

vettaiyadiye kooru pottidum
vidhiyai novadhaam.
Kattu kiliyinai koondil adakkidum
sathiyayai novadhaam.

Nenjae nenjae nenjae nenjae
nee pogum paadhai engae
kaal thodarndhu nadakkum angae

Pennaaga pirandhu pennaaga valarndhaai
unnai solli kuttram illai.
Kanneeril neendhum meenthaaney pengal
kaalam idhai mattra villai.

Oru pen azhudhaal, kaigalai thozhuthaal
adhai vida paavamillai.
dheivangal ellaam iruppadhu edharkku
saabamida neramillai.

Nenjae nenjae nenjae nenjae
nee pogum paadhai engae
kaal thodarndhu nadakkum angae

Parundhugal irukkum vaanaththil thaaney
vinminiyum parakkiradhu.
inbangal mattum irundhidum vazhakai
yaarukku kidaikiradhu.

Vazhiyil aayyiram pallangal irundhum
nadhiyadhai kadakkiradhu.
innum konjam dhooram parandhidu penney
siragugal irukkiradhu.

Nenjae nenjae nenjae nenjae
nee pogum paadhai engae
kaal thodarndhu nadakkum angae

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nenje Nenje'?

The song 'Nenje Nenje' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Ennathan Pesuvatho'?

The movie 'Ennathan Pesuvatho' revolves around themes of love and relationships, where this song plays a pivotal role in showcasing the emotional connection between the characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Dhilip Varman and Harshdeep Kaur, with music composed by D Imman.

When was 'Nenje Nenje' released?

'Nenje Nenje' was released on June 17, 2014, as part of the movie 'Ennathan Pesuvatho'.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Nenje Nenje' from the movie *Ennathan Pesuvatho*, the duet beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, convey a sense of yearning and connection between lovers. With soothing melodies composed by D Imman, the song evokes feelings of nostalgia and romance. It serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of reflection and intimacy, making it a memorable piece in the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenje Nenje from the movie Ennathan Pesuvatho beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Dhilip Varman and Harshdeep Kaur, this duet resonates with deep emotions and a soothing melody. Experience the magic of Nenje Nenje as it takes you on a heartfelt journey through its captivating lyrics and harmonious composition.
stanzaMeanings: Where are you going, my heart? The path you take continues to walk.
Where are you going, my heart? The sight of you continues to walk.
The fate that brings pain is not a joke. The truth that hides in the bird's nest is not a joke.
Where are you going, my heart? The path you take continues to walk.
Born as a girl, raised as a girl, there is no fault in saying this. In tears, the time of girls is not just this.
If a girl cries, it is not a sin to raise hands. There is no time for gods to be punished.
Where are you going, my heart? The path you take continues to walk.
In the sky where the birds are, only the heavens can fly. Only happiness remains, but who gets to live it?
Even if there are a thousand paths, it crosses the river. A little further, the girl has wings.
Where are you going, my heart? The path you take continues to walk.
